name: simplex-web
description: Browser-hosted SimpleX chat UI shell, local session store, transport facade, browser-native SMP primitives, and agent envelope helpers.

scripts.test:ui: node --test tests/default-chat.test.js tests/session-store.test.js tests/transport.test.js tests/interop-vectors.test.mjs tests/browser-smp-core.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-agent.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-client.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-store.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-ratchet.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-scheduler.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-contact-client.test.mjs tests/browser-simplex-e2e-broker.test.mjs tests/browser-xftp-core.test.mjs tests/browser-xftp-client.test.mjs tests/browser-xftp-http-transport.test.mjs tests/browser-xftp-server-profile.test.mjs tests/browser-smp-server-profile.test.mjs tests/browser-smp-websocket-transport.test.mjs tests/browser-smp-websocket-live.test.mjs
scripts.test:haskell: npm run test:haskell-smoke && npm run test:haskell-core
scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:fuzz && npm run test:runtime
